allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in d.get\('exports',{}\).items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('node_modules/storybook/package.json'\)\); deps = {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'doc' in k.lower\(\) or 'block' in k.lower\(\) or 'addon' in k.lower\(\)]")
